metadata.description: Official plugins for CoWork OS by Better Creating

plugins.name: specialist-sub-agent-builder
plugins.description: Build custom AI specialist sub-agents with searchable knowledge bases. Turn your expertise into a ready-to-install plugin — no code required.

plugins.name: personal-assistant
plugins.description: Turns your Admin-PA area into an active personal assistant. Tracks tasks, logs your day, remembers contacts, and briefs you each morning.
